---
title: "Extracting Data based on Spatial Range"
author: "Emily O'Grady"
date: '`r Sys.Date()`'
output: 
  html_document:
    toc: true
    toc_depth: 2
    toc_float: true
    theme: cerulean
vignette: >
  %\VignetteIndexEntry{Spatial Data Extraction}
  %\VignetteEngine{knitr::rmarkdown}
  %\VignetteEncoding{UTF-8}
---
